substep.title: Compose Re-Review Summary
substep.action:
Build a markdown table summarizing this iteration's actions:
| Thread | Status | Details | |--------|--------|---------| | {file}:{line} | Addressed | Commit {sha} | | {file}:{line} | Declined | {short rationale} | | {file}:{line} | Deferred | Issue #{n} |

substep.title: Post Re-Review Request Comment
Update State File
Loop
substep.action: Increment iteration_count. Return to step 3 (await Gemini's response).
